hero.badge: The Performer Standard for Face & Likeness Protection
hero.subtitle: The independent registry that proves you own your face — before someone else profits from it. Built for every performer, not just the famous ones.

steps.subtitle: From zero to legally protected in under 10 minutes.
steps.s1Desc: Create your profile and capture three photos — front, left profile, right profile. Your face is converted into an encrypted mathematical descriptor and timestamped.
steps.s1Out: You get: A permanent legal timestamp proving this is your face
steps.s2Desc: Receive your Face Registration Certificate — a downloadable PDF with your registry ID, capture date, and cryptographic proof of ownership. Share your verified badge anywhere.
steps.s2Out: You get: An official certificate and embeddable verified badge
steps.s3Desc: Our monitoring scans TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, casting platforms, ad networks, and deepfake databases 24/7. The moment we find something — we alert you and take action.
steps.s3Out: You get: Real-time alerts and one-tap takedown tools

why.subtitle: Three reasons performers register their face here first.
why.p1Body: AI can clone your face from 3 photos. ClaimMyFace timestamps your registration so you have proof you came first.
why.p2Title: We Watch So You Don't Have To
why.p2Body: We monitor 7 platforms and 20+ sources 24/7 for unauthorized use of your face, voice, and name.
why.p3Title: From Alert to Action in Minutes
why.p3Body: When we find unauthorized use we generate your DMCA notice, cease-and-desist, and platform report automatically.

trust.body: Everything you register is encrypted with AES-256, stored privately, and never sold, shared, or used to train AI. Ever. You can delete your account and all data at any time.

footer.ctaBody: Join thousands of performers who trust ClaimMyFace to register and defend their likeness.
footer.rights: © 2026 ClaimMyFace / Roberts Entertainment / PerformersappAI. All rights reserved.
footer.alignment: Proud supporter of performer IP rights. Aligned with SAG-AFTRA AI protection principles.

banner.noFakes: The NO FAKES Act is coming. Register your face now and establish your claim date.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's your protection status.
dashboard.takeActionSub: What do you need to do right now?

certificate.title: OFFICIAL FACE REGISTRATION CERTIFICATE
certificate.statement: This certificate confirms that the above-named performer has established documented face and likeness registration with ClaimMyFace. This record serves as timestamped cryptographic proof of identity ownership and has been filed in the ClaimMyFace Secure Registry.
certificate.issuedBy: Issued by ClaimMyFace / Roberts Entertainment / PerformersappAI
certificate.footer: This certificate is legally significant documentation. ClaimMyFace registry records are timestamped, cryptographically signed, and immutable.
certificate.embedSub: Add this badge to your website or email signature.

verify.label: REGISTRY VERIFICATION
verify.title: Public Verification
verify.body: The performer behind this Registry ID has established documented face and likeness registration with ClaimMyFace.
verify.privacy: Personal information is intentionally hidden. Only the performer can disclose their identity.
verify.notFoundBody: No public registration matches this ID.
verify.performerCta: Are you a performer? Establish your claim date now.

celebration.headline: You Are Now ClaimMyFace Verified.
celebration.subheadline: Your face is registered, certified, and protected.
